module_summaries.summary: Users can log in using their credentials. Displays validation messages and redirects upon successful authentication.
Users can register for a new account by filling out a form. Displays validation messages and success confirmation upon registration.
Users can view an overview of their accounts. Displays account details including balance and status.
Users can open a new account by selecting account type and entering deposit details. Displays validation messages and success confirmation upon account opening.
Users can transfer funds between accounts or to external accounts. Displays validation messages and success confirmation upon transfer completion.
Users can pay bills by entering payee and payment details. Displays validation messages and success confirmation upon payment submission.
Users can request a loan by selecting type and entering loan details. Displays validation messages and success confirmation upon loan approval.
Users can update their contact information through an editable form. Displays validation messages and success confirmation upon profile update.
Users can manage their cards by requesting new cards or updating existing ones. Displays validation messages and success confirmation upon card request.
Users can manage investments by buying or selling funds. Displays portfolio snapshot and validation messages upon trade execution.
Users can generate account statements for specific periods. Displays statement generation status and relevant transactions.
Users can change their password through a secure form. Displays validation messages and success confirmation upon password change.
Users can send messages or schedule callbacks for support. Displays confirmation messages and ticket IDs upon successful submission.

test_cases.title: Login with valid email and password
steps: Enter a valid email address in the Email/Username field
Enter a valid password in the Password field
Click on the Sign In button
test_cases.expected_result: Show 'Signed in successfully.' and redirect to the Accounts Overview page

test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicates that New Password and Confirm New Password do not match

test_cases.title: New Password does not meet strong-password policy
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the security settings page
steps: Enter a new password that does not meet strong-password policy
Confirm the new password by entering it again
Click on the Change Password button
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicates the New Password does not meet strong-password policy

test_cases.title: Verify fields are displayed correctly on the page
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the security settings page
steps: Check if Current Password field is displayed
Check if New Password field is displayed
Check if Confirm New Password field is displayed
Check if Change Password button is displayed
test_cases.expected_result: All fields and the Change Password button are displayed correctly

test_cases.expected_result: Shows 'Message sent successfully.' with a ticket ID

steps: Enter a valid reason for the call
Select a preferred date that is at least the next business day
test_cases.expected_result: Callback request submitted.

test_cases.title: Subject field empty
test_cases.expected_result: Displays inline guidance indicating the subject is required

test_cases.title: Message body field empty
steps: Leave the message body field empty
test_cases.expected_result: Displays inline guidance indicating the message body is required

test_cases.title: Preferred Date field empty
steps: Enter a valid reason for the call
Leave the preferred date field empty

test_cases.title: Phone Number field empty
steps: Enter a valid reason for the call
Select a preferred date that is at least the next business day
Leave the phone number field empty
test_cases.expected_result: Shows validation error for Phone Number field.

test_cases.title: Attachment type invalid
test_cases.expected_result: Displays inline guidance indicating the attachment type is invalid

steps: Enter a subject that exceeds the maximum length

test_cases.title: Message body exceeds maximum length
steps: Enter a message body that exceeds the maximum length
test_cases.expected_result: Displays inline guidance indicating the message body length must be checked

Select today's date as preferred date
